releases.title: Episode 1: Frostwake
releases.description: A salvage longship answers a ghost beacon and finds a frozen generation ship carrying a lost skald archive.

releases.title: Episode 2: Oath Signal
releases.description: Clan rivals decode an oath-transmission that can unify the fleet or trigger a blood feud across three sectors.

releases.title: Episode 3: The Last Fjord
releases.description: The fleet races to defend a hidden slipstream fjord that is the only safe route beyond the warfront.

releases.title: Pilot: Docking Rights
releases.description: A union dispute over berth assignments traps a war envoy and a smuggler armada on the same ring.

releases.title: Episode 2: Silent Orbit
releases.description: When comms blackout the station, maintenance crews track a saboteur through gravity ducts and cold storage decks.

releases.title: Teaser: Blue Horizon
releases.description: Survey drones vanish beneath a mirror calm, revealing a submerged city grid older than human expansion.

releases.title: Trailer: Heat Debt
releases.description: An outlaw pilot steals a reactor core shipment and leaves a solar foundry chain in controlled meltdown.
